title: caiophora scabra
intro: Caiophora scabra, also known as the "Andean tree poppy", is a species of flowering plant in the family Loasaceae, native to the Andean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Caiophora scabra are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Caiophora scabra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
